name: ai-smart-study-companion
description: An AI-powered full-stack web application that transforms your study materials into interactive learning experiences.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
